Variables.Name: LeftProjectHeight
Variables.Description: if greater than 0 nav system will attempt to project navlink's start point on geometry below

Variables.Name: MaxFallDownLength
Variables.Description: if greater than 0 nav system will attempt to project navlink's end point on geometry below

Variables.Name: SupportedAgents
Variables.Description: restrict area only to specified agents

Variables.Name: bSnapToCheapestArea
Variables.Description: If set, link will try to snap to cheapest area in given radius

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag0
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag1
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag2
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag3
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag4
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag5
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag6
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: bCustomFlag7
Variables.Description: custom flag, check DescribeCustomFlags for details

Variables.Name: AreaClass
Variables.Description: Area type of this link (empty = default)

Variables.Name: Description
Variables.Description: this is an editor-only property to put descriptions in navlinks setup, to be able to identify it easier
